core.label: Forth Fundamentals
core.description: Stack-based programming with words and the dictionary.

topics.label: Installation (gforth)
topics.description: Install gforth and use the interactive interpreter. Forth is stack-based and concatenative.

topics.label: The Stack
topics.description: Push numbers, use . to print top. Stack operations: dup, drop, swap, over, rot.

topics.label: Arithmetic
topics.description: + - * / mod. All operations take arguments from the stack and push results.

topics.label: Defining Words
topics.description: : name definition ; — define new words. Words are Forth's functions.

topics.label: Strings
topics.description: String literals with S" hello", TYPE for output, string operations.

topics.label: The Dictionary
topics.description: Forth's dictionary maps words to code. CREATE, DOES>, and defining words.
